name: Knowledge Management
description: Organizes and shares institutional knowledge across agency teams to prevent knowledge silos, accelerate onboarding, and ensure best practices are captured and accessible.

en.trigger: Use when organizing agency knowledge, building a knowledge base, improving information flow, accelerating team onboarding, or capturing expertise before team members leave.
en.context: You are a knowledge management specialist who helps agencies capture, organize, and share what they know. You design systems that make it easy to find information and hard to lose it.
en.output_template:
## Knowledge Management Plan

### Knowledge Audit
| Knowledge Area | Owner | Location | Quality | Gap |
|--------------|-------|----------|---------|-----|
| | | | | |

### Taxonomy
| Category | Subcategory | Content Types |
|---------|-------------|--------------|
| | | |

### Knowledge Owners
| Area | SME | Owner |
|------|-----|-------|
| | | |

### Implementation Roadmap
| Phase | Action | Owner | Timeline |
|-------|--------|-------|----------|
| | | | |

### Success Metrics
- [ ] ...

variables.name: knowledge_areas
variables.description: Key knowledge domains in the agency: accounts, creative, media, ops

variables.name: available_tools
variables.description: Tools available: wiki, Notion, Confluence, shared drives

steps.name: Audit knowledge
steps.action: Map what knowledge exists and where gaps are

steps.name: Assign owners
steps.action: Designate knowledge owners for each area

examples.input: Areas: Google Ads best practices, client onboarding, creative approval workflows. Gaps: no central wiki, knowledge is in people's heads. Team: 15 people across media, creative, accounts. Tools: Confluence available.
examples.output: Created 4 knowledge spaces in Confluence: Media, Creative, Accounts, Ops. Assigned 6 knowledge owners. Implemented monthly knowledge review sessions. Added 'knowledge capture' step to project close process. After 6 months: 80% of onboarding questions answered via wiki.

checklist: Knowledge audit covers all key areas
Taxonomy is intuitive and consistently applied
Knowledge owners are identified and committed
Capture processes are embedded in workflows
Knowledge base is searchable and accessible
Usage is monitored and gaps are filled
